description: Choose the tone for your conversation. This will influence how the AI interlocutor communicates with you.

friendly.label: Friendly
friendly.description: The AI will communicate in a warm, casual manner, like chatting with a friend.

formal.label: Formal
formal.description: The AI will use professional language and proper etiquette, suitable for business or academic contexts.

humorous.label: Humorous
humorous.description: The AI will incorporate humor and keep the conversation light and entertaining.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.description: The AI will maintain a balanced, objective tone without being too casual or formal.

encouraging.label: Encouraging
encouraging.description: The AI will be supportive and positive, celebrating your progress and building your confidence.

challenging.label: Challenging
challenging.description: The AI will push you to think critically and express complex ideas with deeper questions.
